rows.displayName: Casa Magna Colorado XV Anniversary 6 x 54
rows.wrapperRole: Nicaragua wrapper sets the top-note character, color, and burn personality for this vitola.
rows.binderRole: Nicaragua binder supports structure, combustion, and integration with the filler stack.
rows.fillerRole: Nicaragua / Honduras filler drives body, strength, and the core flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
rows.flavorNotes: cedar, wood, earth, leather, mineral tobacco
rows.avoidIf: Beginner nicotine-sensitive, very short time window, or user wants opposite body/wrapper style.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user asks for 2024 Top 25 picks, Colorado XV Anniversary, or a medium-full bourbon-friendly smoke at this size.
rows.catalogLine: Casa Magna Colorado XV Anniversary · 6 × 54 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $12 · Notes: cedar, wood, earth, leather
